_README: EDITABLE TEXT — PROGRAMS PAGE. Change only the text INSIDE the quotes on the right of each colon (:). Do NOT change the labels on the left, and keep every quote ("), comma (,) and curly brace ({ }) exactly where it is. Save the file and the website updates automatically. Note: the year-level and program-type badges are set in code because they power the on-page filters, so they are not listed here.

pageHeader.title: Our Programs
pageHeader.description: Every student deserves a learning experience that matches their ambition. Explore our comprehensive suite of programs designed to accelerate achievement at every stage.

ui.emptyState: No programs match your search criteria. Try adjusting your filters.

programs.kindergartenDescription: Build foundational literacy and numeracy skills in a warm, engaging environment. Our early learning program gives your child a launchpad for school success.
programs.primaryDescription: Strengthen core skills in English and mathematics with a curriculum designed to accelerate progress. Small-group sessions build confidence and curiosity.
programs.ocDescription: A targeted program designed to equip students with the skills, strategies, and confidence to excel in the Opportunity Class Placement Test.
programs.naplanDescription: Master the NAPLAN assessment with focused practice, expert feedback, and proven strategies. We help students approach test day with confidence.
programs.selectiveDescription: Our flagship Selective program delivers comprehensive preparation for the Selective High School Placement Test. Rigorous curriculum, mock exams, and personalised feedback.
programs.highSchoolDescription: Build a strong academic foundation for senior years. Our High School Mastery program covers English, Mathematics, and Science with expert guidance.
programs.hscDescription: Maximise your ATAR with our HSC preparation program. Past exam analysis, rubric-aligned marking, and intensive revision sessions designed to accelerate your results.
programs.subjectSpecialistDescription: Deep-dive into specific subjects — from advanced Mathematics and Sciences to Languages and Humanities. Tailored one-on-one and small-group intensives.

bottomCta.title: Not Sure Where to Start?
bottomCta.subtitle: Book a free consultation and we will map out the perfect learning pathway for your child.
